title: efossus crispatus
side_effects: Efossus crispatus can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions, particularly in individuals with pre-existing conditions like asthma or eczema. In rare cases, excessive consumption may lead to vomiting, diarrhea, and abdominal pain due to its irritant properties. Some users may also experience headaches, fatigue, and muscle weakness, especially when combined with other medications. If not used under the guidance of a healthcare professional, Efossus crispatus can cause more severe complications, including respiratory failure and organ damage.
